testcase.name: iframehandling
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for frame to be available: //iframe[@id='iframe-1'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.37.0', revision: '3c1da1e342' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.193, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: C:\Users\AZLANM~1.IEP\AppDa...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59045}, goog:processID: 13256, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59045/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.193, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 856c252e3263c8e6f82c85d3a918d5d4 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.example.iframe.iframehandling(iframe.java:46) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ...
